---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- describe the situation, not the solution -->

## What's your current workaround?

<!-- how are you handling this today without stackguard supporting it? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- if you have one in mind. it's fine to skip this -->

## Have you considered fitting this into an existing command?

<!--
We try hard to keep the surface area small. Adding a flag to
'check' or 'wrap' is almost always preferred over adding a new
top-level command. Tell us if you've thought about this.
-->

## Would you be willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe with guidance
- [ ] No
